name: CR30_Test
machine_start_gcode:
M140 S90 ; Start Bed heating
G4 S240 ; Wait 240s (4m) for Bed lead time — nozzle was ready 90s too early
M104 S240 ; Start Extruder heating
M190 S90 ; Wait for Bed
M109 S240 ; Wait for Extruder
G28 ; home all axes
G1 Y0 F3000 ; ensure gantry is at bed contact
M82 ; absolute extrusion
G92 E0 ; reset extruder
G1 E15 F1000 ; prime extruder
G1 Z20 E25 F800 ; move belt Z20 (part 1 of L)
G1 X250 E50 F2000 ; 250mm prime line on X (part 2 of L)
G1 X0 E75 F2000 ; Return to X0 to thicken anchor
G92 Z0 ; reset belt position to 0 (Logical 0 starts at physical Z20)
G1 Y0.2 ; set nozzle to first layer height
G92 E0 ; reset extruder positions
